title: Chicken Noodle Casserole with Fried Onion Topping
ingredients: 2 ½ cup finely shredded cheddar cheeses
instructions:
Spray a 2qt casserole dish with cooking spray and set aside.
Cook the noodles according to the package directions and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the chicken breast, soup, milk, 2 cups fried onions and frozen vegetables.
Add the cooked noodles and 1 ½ cup of cheese. Stir to combine.
Pour the chicken mixture into the prepared casserole, sprinkle with the seasoning and cover with foil; bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle with the remaining fried onions and cheese.
Bake for another 5 minutes or until the cheese has melted.
